]

    'rugby', 'team', 'club', 'league', 'season', 'game', 'match', 'cup', 'championship', 'tournament',

        if not ('video game' in text or 'gameboy' in text or 'nintendo' in text or 'xbox' in text or 'playstation' in text or 'wii' in text or 'gaming' in text):

            if 'science' in text or 'award' in text or 'competition' in text:

            else:
                is_sports = True
    
    if any(k in text for k in business_financial_keywords):
        is_business = True
        
    if any(k in text for k in tech_keywords):
        is_tech = True
        
    # Decision
    category = 'World'
    
    if is_tech:
        # Tech matches. Check conflicts.
        if is_business:
            # Business + Tech.
            # If explicit financial report -> Business.
            if 'revenue' in text or 'profit' in text or 'earnings' in text or 'stock' in text or 'wall street' in text:

            category = 'Sci/Tech'
        else:
            category = 'Sci/Tech'

        category = 'Sports'
    elif is_business:
        category = 'Business'
    else:

    "fraction": fraction,
    "sci_tech_titles": sci_tech_articles_list
}

print("__RESULT__:")

    'olympic', 'medal', 'athlete', 'player', 'coach', 'manager', 'referee', 'score', 'goal', 
    'touchdown', 'homerun', 'basket', 'point', 'win', 'lose', 'defeat', 'victory', 'draw', 'tie', 
    'stadium', 'field', 'court', 'race', 'racing', 'driver', 'f1', 'nascar', 'yankees', 'red sox',
    'lakers', 'knicks', 'bulls', 'cowboys', 'broncos', 'packers', 'arsenal', 'manchester', 'liverpool',
    'real madrid', 'barcelona', 'ac milan', 'juventus', 'bayern', 'fifa', 'nfl', 'nba', 'mlb', 'nhl'
]

world_keywords = [
    'war', 'peace', 'president', 'minister', 'government', 'election', 'vote', 'army', 'military',
    'attack', 'bomb', 'kill', 'disaster', 'court', 'law', 'iraq', 'bush', 'kerry', 'senate',
    'congress', 'parliament', 'un', 'nato', 'eu', 'treaty', 'nuclear weapon', 'terror'
]

def check_keywords(text, keywords):
    for k in keywords:
        # Regex for whole word match
        # Escape k because it might contain special chars (though unlikely in this list)
        pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(k) + r'\b'
        if re.search(pattern, text):
            return True
    return False

sci_tech_count = 0
sci_tech_articles_list = []

for art in articles:
    # Normalize
    text = (art.get('title', '') + ' ' + art.get('description', '')).lower()
    # Remove some punctuation to help matching "word," etc. (Regex \b handles this but good to be safe)
    # Actually regex \b handles punctuation.
    
    is_sports = check_keywords(text, sports_keywords)
    is_business = check_keywords(text, business_financial_keywords)
    is_tech = check_keywords(text, tech_keywords)
    is_world = check_keywords(text, world_keywords)
    
    # Context Refinement
    if 'video game' in text or 'gameboy' in text or 'nintendo' in text or 'xbox' in text:
        is_tech = True
        is_sports = False # Override sports
        
    if 'science' in text or 'nasa' in text or 'space' in text:
        is_tech = True
        
    # Categorization Priority
    category = 'World' # Default
    
    # 1. Sports is usually distinct unless Tech Sports.
    if is_sports and not is_tech:
        category = 'Sports'
    elif is_sports and is_tech:
        # e.g. "GameBoy mini-games" -> Tech.
        # "New tech for Olympics" -> Tech.
        # "Player wins game" -> Sports.
        if 'gameboy' in text or 'video' in text or 'software' in text or 'simulation' in text:
            category = 'Sci/Tech'
        else:
            category = 'Sports'
            
    elif is_tech:
        # Tech vs Business
        if is_business:
            # Check for financial news
            fin_terms = ['revenue', 'profit', 'earnings', 'loss', 'stock', 'share', 'wall street', 'market', 'dividend', 'outlook', 'forecast', 'debt', 'billion', 'million', 'deal', 'acquisition', 'merger', 'buyout', 'settle', 'lawsuit']
            if check_keywords(text, fin_terms):
                category = 'Business'
            else:
                category = 'Sci/Tech'
        elif is_world:
            # Tech vs World (e.g. "Nuclear" in war vs energy, "Space" in treaty)
            if 'nuclear' in text and ('weapon' in text or 'war' in text or 'bomb' in text or 'iran' in text or 'korea' in text):
                category = 'World'
            elif 'vote' in text or 'election' in text or 'campaign' in text:
                 # "Vote Fraud ... Blogs"
                 category = 'World'
            else:
                category = 'Sci/Tech'
        else:
            category = 'Sci/Tech'
            
    elif is_business:
        category = 'Business'
    else:
        category = 'World'
        
    if category == 'Sci/Tech':
        sci_tech_count += 1
        sci_tech_articles_list.append(art['title'])

total_articles = len(articles)
fraction = sci_tech_count / total_articles if total_articles > 0 else 0

result = {
    "total": total_articles,
    "sci_tech_count": sci_tech_count,
    "fraction": fraction,
    "sci_tech_titles": sci_tech_articles_list
}

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result))

bus_stems = ['revenu', 'profit', 'earn', 'loss', 'quarter', 'share', 'stock', 'market', 'trade', 'wall street', 'dow', 'nasdaq', 's&p', 'econom', 'fed', 'bank', 'financ', 'invest', 'dividend', 'ipo', 'merger', 'acquisit', 'buyout', 'interest', 'inflat', 'sale', 'retail', 'forecast', 'outlook', 'jobless', 'deal', 'billion', 'million', 'ceo', 'cfo', 'execut', 'business', 'corp', 'compan', 'industr', 'price', 'cost', 'oil', 'gas', 'gold', 'currenc', 'dollar', 'euro', 'yen', 'spend', 'debt', 'settl', 'lawsuit']

sport_stems = ['sport', 'footbal', 'basebal', 'basketbal', 'hockey', 'soccer', 'tennis', 'golf', 'cricket', 'rugby', 'team', 'club', 'leagu', 'season', 'game', 'match', 'cup', 'champion', 'tourna', 'olympic', 'medal', 'athlet', 'player', 'coach', 'manager', 'referee', 'score', 'goal', 'touchdown', 'homerun', 'basket', 'point', 'win', 'won', 'lose', 'lost', 'defeat', 'victor', 'draw', 'tie', 'stadium', 'race', 'racing', 'driver', 'f1', 'nascar', 'yankees', 'red sox', 'lakers']

world_stems = ['war', 'peace', 'presid', 'minist', 'govern', 'elect', 'vote', 'army', 'militar', 'attack', 'bomb', 'kill', 'disast', 'court', 'law', 'iraq', 'bush', 'kerry', 'senat', 'congress', 'parliament', 'un', 'nato', 'eu', 'treaty', 'terror']

# Strict words (regex match \bword\b)
strict_tech = ['intel', 'hp', 'it', 'ip', 'pc', 'web', 'net', 'mac', 'os', 'mars'] 

# Financial terms that force Business category
fin_terms = ['revenu', 'profit', 'earn', 'loss', 'stock', 'share', 'wall street', 'dividend', 'debt', 'outlook']

sci_tech_count = 0
titles = []

for art in articles:
    text = (art.get('title', '') + ' ' + art.get('description', '')).lower()
    
    # Calculate scores
    s_tech = sum(1 for k in tech_stems if k in text)
    # Add strict tech matches
    for k in strict_tech:
        if re.search(r'\b' + re.escape(k) + r'\b', text):
            s_tech += 1
            
    s_bus = sum(1 for k in bus_stems if k in text)
    s_sport = sum(1 for k in sport_stems if k in text)
    s_world = sum(1 for k in world_stems if k in text)
    
    # Weighting
    if 'science' in text or 'space' in text or 'gameboy' in text or 'nasa' in text:
        s_tech += 2
        
    # Determine Category
    # Force Business if Financial
    is_fin = any(k in text for k in fin_terms)
    if is_fin:
        cat = 'Business'
    else:
        scores = {'Sci/Tech': s_tech, 'Business': s_bus, 'Sports': s_sport, 'World': s_world}
        max_cat = max(scores, key=scores.get)
        max_val = scores[max_cat]
        
        if max_val == 0:
            cat = 'World'
        elif max_cat == 'Sci/Tech':
            # Check conflicts
            if s_world >= s_tech:
                 # "Nuclear war" -> World
                 if 'nuclear' in text and ('weapon' in text or 'war' in text):
                     cat = 'World'
                 elif 'vote' in text: # Vote fraud blogs
                     cat = 'World'
                 else:
                     cat = 'Sci/Tech'
            elif s_sport >= s_tech:
                 # "Science competition team" -> Tech
                 if 'science' in text or 'gameboy' in text:
                     cat = 'Sci/Tech'
                 else:
                     cat = 'Sports'
            else:
                cat = 'Sci/Tech'
        else:
            cat = max_cat

    if cat == 'Sci/Tech':
        sci_tech_count += 1
        titles.append(art['title'])

result = {
    "total": len(articles),
    "sci_tech_count": sci_tech_count,
    "fraction": sci_tech_count / len(articles),
    "titles": titles
}
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result))

import re

file_path = locals()['var_function-call-6639336741831409058']
with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
    articles = json.load(f)

# Stems (substring match)
tech_stems = ['scien', 'technolog', 'comput', 'softwar', 'hardwar', 'internet', 'cyber', 'onlin', 'digit', 'robot', 'space', 'nasa', 'astronom', 'galax', 'mars', 'moon', 'univers', 'biolog', 'physic', 'chemist', 'medic', 'health', 'diseas', 'virus', 'cancer', 'dna', 'research', 'lab', 'laborator', 'innovat', 'invent', 'gadget', 'devic', 'mobil', 'phone', 'wireless', 'network', 'telecom', 'satellit', 'microsoft', 'apple', 'google', 'ibm', 'linux', 'window', 'browser', 'server', 'chip', 'process', 'data', 'algorithm', 'engin', 'machin', 'power', 'energ', 'electr', 'batter', 'solar', 'nuclear', 'climat', 'video game', 'gameboy', 'nintendo', 'sony', 'xbox', 'playstation', 'wii', 'gamer', 'gaming', 'hack', 'spam', 'malware', 'security', 'password', 'firefox', 'explor', 'ipod', 'mp3', 'download', 'file', 'email', 'blog', 'shuttle', 'probe', 'orbit', 'broadband', 'wifi', 'bluetooth', 'semiconduct', 'nanotech', 'laser', 'stem cell', 'clon', 'itunes', 'ebay', 'paypal', 'skype', 'yahoo', 'isp', 'gps', 'dvd', 'automot', 'hybrid', 'toyota', 'honda', 'ford', 'daimler', 'chrysler']

bus_stems = ['revenu', 'profit', 'earn', 'loss', 'quarter', 'share', 'stock', 'market', 'trade', 'wall street', 'dow', 'nasdaq', 's&p', 'econom', 'fed', 'bank', 'financ', 'invest', 'dividend', 'ipo', 'merger', 'acquisit', 'buyout', 'interest', 'inflat', 'sale', 'retail', 'forecast', 'outlook', 'jobless', 'deal', 'billion', 'million', 'ceo', 'cfo', 'execut', 'business', 'corp', 'compan', 'industr', 'price', 'cost', 'oil', 'gas', 'gold', 'currenc', 'dollar', 'euro', 'yen', 'spend', 'debt', 'settl', 'lawsuit']

sport_stems = ['sport', 'footbal', 'basebal', 'basketbal', 'hockey', 'soccer', 'tennis', 'golf', 'cricket', 'rugby', 'team', 'club', 'leagu', 'season', 'game', 'match', 'cup', 'champion', 'tourna', 'olympic', 'medal', 'athlet', 'player', 'coach', 'manager', 'referee', 'score', 'goal', 'touchdown', 'homerun', 'basket', 'point', 'win', 'won', 'lose', 'lost', 'defeat', 'victor', 'draw', 'tie', 'stadium', 'race', 'racing', 'driver', 'f1', 'nascar', 'yankees', 'red sox', 'lakers']

world_stems = ['war', 'peace', 'presid', 'minist', 'govern', 'elect', 'vote', 'army', 'militar', 'attack', 'bomb', 'kill', 'disast', 'court', 'law', 'iraq', 'bush', 'kerry', 'senat', 'congress', 'parliament', 'un', 'nato', 'eu', 'treaty', 'terror']

# Strict words (regex match \bword\b)
strict_tech = ['intel', 'hp', 'it', 'ip', 'pc', 'web', 'net', 'mac', 'os', 'mars'] 

# Financial terms that force Business category
fin_terms = ['revenu', 'profit', 'earn', 'loss', 'stock', 'share', 'wall street', 'dividend', 'debt', 'outlook']

sci_tech_count = 0
titles = []

for art in articles:
    text = (art.get('title', '') + ' ' + art.get('description', '')).lower()
    
    # Calculate scores
    s_tech = sum(1 for k in tech_stems if k in text)
    # Add strict tech matches
    for k in strict_tech:
        if re.search(r'\b' + re.escape(k) + r'\b', text):
            s_tech += 1
            
    s_bus = sum(1 for k in bus_stems if k in text)
    s_sport = sum(1 for k in sport_stems if k in text)
    s_world = sum(1 for k in world_stems if k in text)
    
    # Weighting
    if 'science' in text or 'space' in text or 'gameboy' in text or 'nasa' in text:
        s_tech += 2
        
    # Determine Category
    # Force Business if Financial
    is_fin = any(k in text for k in fin_terms)
    if is_fin:
        cat = 'Business'
    else:
        scores = {'Sci/Tech': s_tech, 'Business': s_bus, 'Sports': s_sport, 'World': s_world}
        max_cat = max(scores, key=scores.get)
        max_val = scores[max_cat]
        
        if max_val == 0:
            cat = 'World'
        elif max_cat == 'Sci/Tech':
            # Check conflicts
            if s_world >= s_tech:
                 # "Nuclear war" -> World
                 if 'nuclear' in text and ('weapon' in text or 'war' in text):
                     cat = 'World'
                 elif 'vote' in text: # Vote fraud blogs
                     cat = 'World'
                 else:
                     cat = 'Sci/Tech'
            elif s_sport >= s_tech:
                 # "Science competition team" -> Tech
                 if 'science' in text or 'gameboy' in text:
                     cat = 'Sci/Tech'
                 else:
                     cat = 'Sports'
            else:
                cat = 'Sci/Tech'
        else:
            cat = max_cat

    if cat == 'Sci/Tech':
        sci_tech_count += 1
        titles.append(art['title'])

result = {
    "total": len(articles),
    "sci_tech_count": sci_tech_count,
    "fraction": sci_tech_count / len(articles),
    "titles": titles
}
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result))

import json
import re

file_path = locals()['var_function-call-6639336741831409058']
with open(file_path, 'r') as f:
    articles = json.load(f)

# Definitions match previous
tech_stems = ['scien', 'technolog', 'tech', 'comput', 'softwar', 'hardwar', 'internet', 'cyber', 'web', 'onlin', 'digit', 'robot', 'space', 'nasa', 'astronom', 'galax', 'mars', 'moon', 'univers', 'biolog', 'physic', 'chemist', 'medic', 'health', 'diseas', 'virus', 'cancer', 'dna', 'research', 'lab', 'laborator', 'innovat', 'invent', 'gadget', 'devic', 'mobil', 'phone', 'wireless', 'network', 'telecom', 'satellit', 'microsoft', 'apple', 'google', 'ibm', 'linux', 'window', 'browser', 'server', 'chip', 'process', 'data', 'algorithm', 'engin', 'machin', 'power', 'energ', 'electr', 'batter', 'solar', 'nuclear', 'climat', 'video game', 'gameboy', 'nintendo', 'sony', 'xbox', 'playstation', 'wii', 'gamer', 'gaming', 'hack', 'spam', 'malware', 'security', 'password', 'firefox', 'explor', 'ipod', 'mp3', 'download', 'file', 'email', 'blog', 'shuttle', 'probe', 'orbit', 'broadband', 'wifi', 'bluetooth', 'semiconduct', 'nanotech', 'laser', 'stem cell', 'clon', 'itunes', 'ebay', 'paypal', 'skype', 'yahoo', 'isp', 'gps', 'dvd', 'automot', 'hybrid', 'toyota', 'honda', 'ford', 'daimler', 'chrysler']
bus_stems = ['revenu', 'profit', 'earn', 'loss', 'quarter', 'share', 'stock', 'market', 'trade', 'wall street', 'dow', 'nasdaq', 's&p', 'econom', 'fed', 'bank', 'financ', 'invest', 'dividend', 'ipo', 'merger', 'acquisit', 'buyout', 'interest', 'inflat', 'sale', 'retail', 'forecast', 'outlook', 'jobless', 'deal', 'billion', 'million', 'ceo', 'cfo', 'execut', 'business', 'corp', 'compan', 'industr', 'price', 'cost', 'oil', 'gas', 'gold', 'currenc', 'dollar', 'euro', 'yen', 'spend', 'debt', 'settl', 'lawsuit']
fin_terms = ['revenu', 'profit', 'earn', 'loss', 'stock', 'share', 'wall street', 'dividend', 'debt', 'outlook']
strict_tech = ['intel', 'hp', 'it', 'ip', 'pc', 'web', 'net', 'mac', 'os', 'mars']

debug_titles = ["TechBrief: Vodafone seeks new frontiers", "Texas Instruments Posts Higher 3Q Profits (AP)", "Chinese Firm To Buy IBM #39;s PC Business For \\$1.75 Billion"]
res_str = ""

for art in articles:
    if art['title'] in debug_titles:
        text = (art.get('title', '') + ' ' + art.get('description', '')).lower()
        s_tech = sum(1 for k in tech_stems if k in text)
        for k in strict_tech:
            if re.search(r'\b' + re.escape(k) + r'\b', text):
                s_tech += 1
        s_bus = sum(1 for k in bus_stems if k in text)
        is_fin = any(k in text for k in fin_terms)
        
        res_str += f"Title: {art['title']}, Tech: {s_tech}, Bus: {s_bus}, Fin: {is_fin}\n"

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(res_str))
